SUBJECT:
FY 2022-23 FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT
SYNOPSIS
Staff submits the first quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that "the City
Council accept the report and approve the budget adjustments.
BACKGROUND
The City Council adopted the FY 2022—23 budgets on June 8, 2022, with approved
General Fund revenues of $188.91 million and expenditures of $186.85 million. The City
adopted budget for all funds is $569.79 million in revenues and $592.72 million in
expenditures.
The report summarizes the preliminary General Fund major operating funds results as
